name: Elara Sand
description: Warm sand / beige background with terracotta accent. Large high-contrast headline at the top (OCR-friendly), device framed below. Gender-neutral, premium, differentiates from pink pregnancy competitors. Every slot is a real in-app screen (no full-bleed art).
decorationsHint: Background only, behind the device — never touch the screen or move the phone. Warm SAND / BEIGE, never flat: large soft layered rounded blobs and dune-like waves blending cream #F4ECDD -> sand #ECE3D4 -> warm clay #E2D4BD, big and gently out-of-focus, with a soft terracotta #C97B5A glow / halo centered behind the phone and a few sparse translucent terracotta bubbles at low opacity. Calm, warm, premium, gender-neutral — never clinical, never pink, no 3D, no stock graphics, no extracted UI cards, no objects. Lots of breathing room.

samples.descriptor: Week by week — baby size & due date
